title: Public Files is live!

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to Public Files!

Public Files allows you to share your documents stored within monday.com via a URL.

Simply add the automation to any board, using one of the automatic triggers create a unique URL to share your files with your customers, prospects, staff, who ever!

You can even add the links to your automation Gmail and Outlook emails via the native integrations!

Try our Public Files now with a 14 day free trial - Try Public Files now! - monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: P52Dave (Dave Braunstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the Public Files app HIPAA compliant?
